title: Mid Journey
description: Kinda mid. A satire AI mod for ModFest: Carnival
body:
The world of Minecraft building has long since stagnated. We at Mid Journey believe this field needs innovating. With our new technology we have been able to cram 15 gnomes into a block and force them to do math, opening up an entire realm of possibilities. The new Advanced Building Assistant Block™ currently allows access to our new invention which will revolutionize Minecraft building forever. Picture the following scenario: you want to create a block of a specific colour. Regular applications might allow you to create a block by specifying its colour via a colour picker. This outdated and complicated piece of ui serves only to gatekeep access to coloured blocks to those that understand colour pickers. With our patent-pending technology, you can simply type the colour you want and get this block. This will boost your productivity, allowing you to spend less time looking at a wheel. And it will open up colour-technology to everypony by making it intuitive and easy to use.

Of course, the Advanced Building Assistant Block is fully powered by blockchain. Simply attach any blockchain into the assistant and it'll be able to power itself solely by interfacing with the blockchain technology. 

---

Mid Journey is a satire submission to [modfest carnival](https://modfest.net/carnival). See the gallery for some more information.

The project makes use of training data from [wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_colors_(alphabetical))
